archetype: Archetype 2 (The Performance Pro) combined with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury)
design_philosophy: A modern, dark, sporty control center for sports card investors. High-visibility 'Tactical' look mixed with premium collector aesthetics. Deep blacks, crisp white data, and neon kinetic accents to signify performance and value.

headings.rules: Must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for athletic weight. Black or ExtraBold weight for H1/H2.

body.rules: Increased tracking for legibility in data tables. Clean geometric sans for stats.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black uppercase
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold uppercase

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Dense 'Control Room' for the dashboard stats, 'Bento Grid' for the card collection.
spacing_and_layout.collection_grid: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6 md:gap-8

surface_strategies.headers: Crystal Glass: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background (#141414), 1px solid border-white/10. Hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(255,59,48,0.15)] border-white/20 transition-all duration-300.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#FF3B30]/90 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.status_badge_in_collection: bg-[#007AFF]/10 text-[#007AFF] border border-[#007AFF]/20 text-xs px-2 py-1 uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.status_badge_sold: bg-[#34C759]/10 text-[#34C759] border border-[#34C759]/20 text-xs px-2 py-1 uppercase tracking-wider

components.inputs: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-white/10 text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF3B30] focus:border-[#FF3B30]
components.shadcn_customizations: Remove excessive rounded corners (stick to md or sm). Ensure all dropdowns and modals use #141414 background to avoid white flash. Use pure HTML forms where Shadcn components are too complex to style.

motion_interactions.hover: Subtle Y-axis translation (-translate-y-1) and increased border opacity for cards.
motion_interactions.loading: Use an electric blue or red glowing skeleton loader rather than standard grey.

login_hero_bg.description: Person holding a basketball card in hand against dark background
login_hero_bg.usage: Use as full-screen background image for the Login/Signup page with a bg-black/50 overlay to ensure text readability.

empty_state_image.usage: Use as a placeholder visual when the user's collection is completely empty.

data_testid_conventions.rule: Kebab-case, role-based, mandatory on all interactive elements.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React for all icons. Size 16-20px for labels, 24px for key actions. Stroke width 2px.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure global dark mode by setting 'dark' class on the HTML element or configuring Tailwind config to dark: 'class' and enforcing it.
Apply Barlow Condensed for all Headers (H1-H4) and DM Sans for Body. Ensure they are imported via Google Fonts in the global CSS or index.html.
Use Shadcn UI for Table, Dialog (Modals), Forms, and Dropdowns, but strictly override their default background colors to match #0A0A0A and #141414. Do NOT use default light mode shades.
Login Page: Use a modern bento layout or a split screen: left side is the login form, right side is the login_hero_bg image spanning full height with an overlay.
Dashboard Cards (Metrics): Must clearly show Total Sales, Total Paid, Total Expenses, and Net Profit. Net Profit should highlight in success green (#34C759) if positive, or red (#FF3B30) if negative.
Card Collection: Use a grid layout. Each card should show the image (if uploaded, else a sleek dark placeholder), name, year, price paid, and a badge for 'In Collection' or 'Sold'.
Authentication: Implement both JWT (Email/Password) and a Google Login button on the UI.
Image Upload: Ensure the Add/Edit form includes a file input or drop zone for card images.
Testing: Add data-testid attributes to ALL form inputs, buttons, and individual card wrappers.
